spec_match.rationale: Outstanding breakdown of fields (names, slugs, codes, passwords) mapped to recommended settings and justifications.

interactive.rationale: Offers five different live input/textarea elements with varying autocorrect flags, plus a dynamic JS probe readout showing attribute settings for each.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Extremely well aligned, teaching authors exactly when and how to configure this global attribute.

edge_cases.rationale: Detailed considerations for security inputs (passwords/API keys) and custom identifier constraints.

references.rationale: Links are present for ChromeStatus, MDN, and general spec directories.

design_system.rationale: Excellent styling using custom badges, a clean matrix table, and responsive grid panels.

summary: The form-field-matrix is an exceptional instructional table coupled with live sandbox form fields that teaches developers the appropriate autocorrect values for all standard web forms.
